Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Property From Mechanic'S Lien
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER VIRGINIA JONES NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN is OFF CALENDAR. No proper service.

Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Property From Mechanic'S Lien
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Continued To Jan-09-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER VIRGINIA JONES NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN is continued to January 9, 2025. No later than December 30, 2024 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief addressing the propriety and sufficiency of e-mail service.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Release Property From Mechanic'S Lien
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance

Donna Etamedi Esq., Etamedi Legal Group, 323-688-0616, via zoom for plaintiff

Ms. Etamedi contests to the tentative. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER VIRGINIA JONES Notice Of Motion And Motion To Release Property From Mechanic'S Lien is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Property From Mechanic'S Lien [Cal. Civil Code 8460 And 8480]
Off Calendar Oct-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER VIRGINIA JONES NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN [CAL. CIVIL CODE 8460 AND 8480] is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with the Court's September 5, 2024 minute order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Release Of Property From Mechanic'S Lien [Cal. Civil Code 8460 And 8480]
Off Calendar Sep-05-2024 Continued To Oct-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to October 4, 2024. No later than September 20, 2024, moving party to (1) file a request for judicial notice attaching a copy of the judgment referenced in section C of the motion and a copy of the complaint in the case resulting in such judgment; and (2) supplemental brief, not to exceed 2 pages, providing authorities for electronic service of this motion on a party that has not yet appeared in this action. Authorities shall include citations to code of civil procedure, California rules of Court, local rules and case citations. Moving party is further ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of its filings in support of the motion no later than September 20, 2024, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
